title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and backend basics.

title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: Master UI/UX design principles, wireframing, prototyping, and Figma tools.

title: Digital Marketing Fundamentals
description: Learn SEO, social media marketing, email campaigns, and digital advertising strategies.

title: React.js From Zero to Advanced

title: Python for Beginners
description: Start programming with Python. Learn syntax, logic building, and small projects.

title: Data Structures & Algorithms
description: Master DSA concepts including arrays, linked lists, trees, graphs, and sorting algorithms.
